name: Stacked Skillet & Social House Kitchen Collective
concept: Maximalist brunch and comfort-food venue trying to sell breakfast, lunch, desserts, drinks, retail sauces, loyalty messaging, and QR ordering from one portrait screen.
audience: Footfall-heavy mixed audience with very little dwell time.
locationContext: Busy transport hub food court with strong glare and passing traffic.
brandStory: Energetic all-day venue with a tendency to over-explain every offer.
